## Proposed Approach {.nav-approach}

*Explore, then Answer* ([EtA]{style="font-variant: small-caps;"}).

```{=html}
<div style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.85em; border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 0.6em 1em; border-radius: 4px; background: #f9f9f9; display: inline-block; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;">
  <div><strong>Algorithm</strong> <span style="font-variant: small-caps;">EtA</span></div>
  <div style="margin-top: 0.3em;"><strong>1:</strong> &nbsp;Learn Pareto-optimal policy family \(\mathcal{F}\) using MORL</div>
  <div><strong>2:</strong> &nbsp;Generate \(K\) high-quality and diverse examples to familiarize the human</div>
  <div><strong>3:</strong> &nbsp;Use active PBL to find the human's desired policy \(\pi^*\)</div>
</div>
```

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: -1em;">
![](images/qual-method.svg){width="100%"}
</div>
